decision.archive_summary: Earlier editor-default troubleshooting appears resolved: the default editor was identified as Zed, and the GC-D2 fix was reported as effective. A durable repo workflow emerged: use `npm run codex:vscode:gc --silent` as the minimal spot-check, and if prompt text has not landed yet, rerun the context-minor-GC script with an explicit prompt. The regression/smoke path was then formalized by adding a repeatable eval case in `evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js`.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn is a short continuation signal ('要') that still depends on the immediately preceding exchange about the repo-internal repeatable smoke/eval case, so this is the same active topic rather than a switch. The older editor-status and 'what next' turns are solved and can leave the next-turn raw prompt. The recent regression-case context should stay available, and its durable details are worth pinning because they are likely to matter even if some raw turns are later compacted.
